babyDevelopment: All essential physical organs have begun developing. The heart is divided into 4 chambers. The placenta takes over hormone production.
bodyChanges: Hormones are peaking, causing extreme fatigue. Your waistline might thicken slightly, though it's mainly bloating.
tips: Invest in a good supportive bra

do: Talk to other moms for support

travelAdvisory.note: Travel is safe. Wear compression socks on long flights.

warningSignsToWatch: Sudden disappearance of pregnancy symptoms (though they naturally fade later)
milestoneDescription: A huge milestone! The basic structure of all major organs is in place.
